title: ArchorClient
description: ArchorClient is a Hypixel Skyblock–optimized Minecraft modpack made for mobile users on ZalithLauncher, with full support for the MobileGlues render plugin. It includes top Skyblock QOL mods (Skyblocker, SkyHanni, Aaron’s QOL, Firmament) and performance mo
body:
### 🌟 ArchorClient — Optimized Hypixel Skyblock Modpack for Mobile

ArchorClient is a **performance-focused Minecraft modpack** designed mainly for **Hypixel Skyblock**, built especially for **mobile users using ZalithLauncher**.  
It fully supports and takes advantage of **MobileGlues**, a render plugin for mobile launchers that adds better mod compatibility, improved rendering, and smoother performance.

PC users can also use the modpack, but all optimizations are designed with mobile devices in mind.

### 🔥 Key Features
- ⚡ Smooth performance on low-end and mobile devices  
- 🎯 Pre-configured Hypixel Skyblock QOL mods  
- 🚀 Reduced lag, faster loading, and smooth animations  
- 🛠️ No setup required — everything is already optimized  
- 🖥️ Clean and simple UI improvements  

### 🔧 Included Skyblock QOL Mods
ArchorClient includes the **best Skyblock QOL mods**, already configured:
- **Skyblocker**  
- **SkyHanni**  
- **Aaron’s QOL**  
- **Firmament**  

Plus essential performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, etc.

### 🎮 Why ArchorClient?
- Built specifically for **ZalithLauncher + MobileGlues**  
- Great performance on mobile hardware  
- High compatibility with Hypixel Skyblock  
- Zero-setup, plug-and-play experience  
- Works well on low-end PCs too  

### 🔄 Active Development
- Updated mod versions  
- Better mobile optimization  
- More Skyblock overlays & QOL features  
- Stability improvements for MobileGlues users  

---

### 📝 Feedback & Issues  
Found a bug or have a suggestion?  
👉 https://github.com/Akar1881/ArchorClient/issues
